use_cases: Voice note capture in productivity and collaboration apps
Audio message recording in messaging and communication platforms
Voice memo creation for personal task management
Voice command initiation in AI assistant interfaces
Quick audio feedback collection in surveys or forms
ai_summary: A PulseVoiceRecorder component featuring an animated microphone button with pulsing ring visualizations during active recording. Includes a duration timer display and toggle functionality for starting/stopping voice capture. Built with React hooks for state management and CSS animations for smooth visual feedback. The component uses a minimalist flat design with blue accent colors and transparent overlay effects, making it suitable for integration into various SaaS and communication applications requiring voice input capabilities.
